composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief: BTC remains 17pp below the -35% drawdown filter and 3.8pp shy of the 40% volatility threshold, both improving. Structural risk stays active, blocking entry signals regardless of z-score momentum. A crisis z below -3.0 or price recovery above the 200d MA (currently -21%) would alter the regime.
